india_trends.title: Recode Studios IPO GMP signals 27% listing pop — Issue booked 104x so far on Day 3. Check key details
india_trends.summary: Recode Studios IPO GMP was ₹43 per share, suggesting that its shares were trading at ₹201 in the unofficial market. At the prevailing GMP, Recode Studios shares could list at a premium of 27.22% as against the offer price of ₹158.

india_trends.title: BlackRock to invest in Shapoorji Pallonji's unit: Report
india_trends.summary: BlackRock, the world's largest money manager, ​is set to invest ​in a dollar bond to be issued by a ​unit of India's Shapoorji Pallonji Group this month, two people directly familiar with the transaction said.

india_trends.title: Polycab’s outlook brightens after FY26 market share gains
india_trends.summary: Polycab’s shares have gained 34% from their early April lows. Margin recovery with sustained revenue growth would be critical for the stock.

india_trends.title: ET Alpha Wealth Summit: How AI, volatility and global trends will shape D-Street’s next move
india_trends.summary: Markets navigated Covid-19's impact and Trump's tariffs, only to face Middle East geopolitical tensions. The ET Alpha Wealth Summit on June 4 in Mumbai will gather experts to decode the market's next phase, explore AI's influence on jobs and the economy, and discuss global vs. local investment strat

india_trends.title: Hyundai Creta revised variant launched: Check key features and other details
india_trends.summary: Hyundai India has updated the Creta for 2026. Several variants, including SX Tech and SX(O), are discontinued. This simplifies the SUV's offerings. The Creta now features seven trims. Prices range from Rs 10.79 lakh to Rs 19.90 lakh. Advanced driver assistance systems are now exclusive to the top Ki

india_trends.title: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC joins Category III AIF rush with ₹2,000 crore fund
india_trends.summary: This follows growing investor appetite for Category III AIFs, which are increasingly being used by asset managers and wealth firms to offer hedge fund-like public market products to high-net-worth individuals (HNIs), ultra-HNIs and family offices.

india_trends.title: Bharat Forge Q4 results 2026: Profit falls 17.5% YoY to ₹232.57 crore; recommends final dividend of ₹6.50 for FY26
india_trends.summary: For the full year FY26, the company's profit rose by 14.72% to ₹1,079.66 crore from ₹941.15 crore in FY25, while revenue from operations climbed by 11.17% to ₹16,811.65 crore from ₹15,122.80 crore in FY25.

india_trends.title: Promoter Shareholding: Godrej Properties, Adani Energy see stake hike; BHEL, Vishal Mega Mart, Biocon face cuts
india_trends.summary: Promoter Shareholding: The companies that recorded an increase in promoter ownership between the December 2025 and March 2026, Godrej Properties saw promoter holding rise from 47.2% to 51.7%, while Adani Energy Solutions witnessed an increase from 71.2% to 72.7%.

india_trends.title: FMCG major Emami to acquire majority stake in Vedix, SkinKraft parent co IncNut
india_trends.summary: Emami Limited is acquiring a 60 percent stake in IncNut Digital for Rs 321 crore. This move strengthens Emami's position in the growing personalized beauty and personal care market. IncNut Digital owns popular brands Vedix and SkinKraft. The partnership aims to accelerate innovation and expand reach

india_trends.title: MRF Q4 Results: Profit rises 37% YoY to Rs 680 crore; co declares Rs 229 per share dividend
india_trends.summary: MRF Q4 Results: Tyre maker MRF announced strong financial results. Net profit surged 37% year-on-year to Rs 680 crore in the fourth quarter. Revenue from operations also saw a 14% increase. For the full financial year, MRF reported an 11% growth in revenue and a 29% rise in annual net profit. The co

india_trends.title: Upcoming IPO: InCred Holdings files updated draft papers with SEBI for IPO
india_trends.summary: Upcoming IPO: InCred Holdings Ltd has filed its Updated Draft Red Herring Prospectus-I with SEBI, moving closer to its IPO. The offering includes ₹1,250 crores in new equity shares and an offer for sale of 99,020,833 shares, primarily to invest in its subsidiary, InCred Finance.

india_trends.title: Noel Tata’s IPO pushback said to trigger internal differences at Tata Group
india_trends.summary: A rift is emerging within the Tata conglomerate. Noel Tata opposes listing the parent firm, Tata Sons, despite upcoming Reserve Bank of India regulations. Two trustees will propose a public listing at an upcoming board meeting. This move aims to bring transparency and rigor. The Shapoorji Pallonji G

india_trends.title: Nifty slips into red by midday; HDFC Life, Bajaj Auto buck the trend
india_trends.summary: Among the top Nifty50 gainers at midday, HDFC Life Insurance was the standout performer, rising 3.61% to ₹628.25 against a previous close of ₹606.35, after opening at ₹611

india_trends.title: AI boom keeping markets elevated despite geopolitical noise: Mark Matthews
india_trends.summary: Financial markets are increasingly prioritizing artificial intelligence-driven growth and corporate earnings over geopolitical tensions, according to Mark Matthews. He highlights extraordinary earnings, particularly in tech, fueling market highs despite Middle East uncertainty. Matthews also sees In

india_trends.title: Liquor maker Radico Khaitan resumes Gulf shipments as tensions ease
india_trends.summary: Radico Khaitan's exports to the Gulf are resuming after a halt due to regional conflict. Shipments stalled in March and April but are now gradually restarting. Other markets like Africa and Asia-Pacific compensated for the slowdown. The company achieved record export sales in the last fiscal year.

india_trends.title: Navratna PSU BEL announces board meet date for Q4 results and dividend. Details here
india_trends.summary: Navratna PSU BEL will announce its Q4 results and final dividend later this month. The stock opened at ₹439.90 per share today, as compared to the previous close of ₹438.20 on Wednesday.

india_trends.title: CarTrade Tech Q4 Results: Net profit surges 54% YoY to Rs 65 crore, shares rally 8%
india_trends.summary: CarTrade Tech reported a 54% year-on-year jump in Q4FY26 consolidated net profit to Rs 64.6 crore, while revenue from operations rose nearly 20% to Rs 203.1 crore. The strong earnings performance lifted the company’s shares by 8%.
